video_prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. Protagonist A's hand trembles, dropping the photo, Memory flash: rain pouring outside a window at night, Cut back to present, protagonist looks shocked. Narration: "林澈的记忆突然断开。母亲失踪那晚，也下着这样的雨。". Protagonist A says: "我不是都忘了吗？". Camera motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action. Medium shot of a young man (Protagonist A) sitting at a kitchen table, hand trembling over a photo, expression of shock and confusion, dim kitchen lighting, rain visible through window, cinematic, moody. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. Scene layout locked to context reference frame. Do not reposition props or alter lighting source.. Camera transition smooth from previous shot continuity frame. No abrupt jump cut between shots. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
video_prompt_keywords: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, red fridge, wooden table, rainy window, dim warm lamp + blue moonlight, charA_v1, short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand, Protagonist A's hand trembles, dropping the photo, Memory flash: rain pouring outside a window at night, Cut back to present, protagonist looks shocked, Protagonist A says: "我不是都忘了吗？", Medium shot of a young man (Protagonist A) sitting at a kitchen table, hand trembling over a photo, expression of shock and confusion, dim kitchen lighting, rain visible through window

negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, smiling, bright, static, no rain, multiple characters, duplicate person, clone, inconsistent lighting, wrong angle, lens distortion, chromatic aberration, mouth mismatch, silent face, frozen expression, unnatural dubbing, face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, extra fingers, distorted limbs, text artifacts, burnt-in subtitles, logo, watermark, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
camera_motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action

workflow.tool_instructions: No keyframes found yet. Generate keyframe images first using build-image-prompts, save them to S008/keyframes, then re-run this compiler for img2vid conditioning. Text-to-video is still possible with just 'video_prompt'.
